subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have enjoined pure justice upon all and forbidden them from oppression in divers Tablets, as attested by Him Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا امرنا الکل بالعدل الخالص و نهیناهم عن الظلم فی الواح شتی یشهد بذلک من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
